# Parkside Advisory Group

> Parkside builds practical AI systems for service businesses. The systems answer every inbound lead within 60 seconds, follow up automatically over SMS, book appointments, and recover revenue from missed calls and stale estimates.

Parkside is based in Charlotte, North Carolina, and was founded in 2024 by Anthony Mora, a senior operator with nine years of project controls experience managing capital infrastructure programs at utility scale (Sargent & Lundy, supporting Xcel Energy). The firm installs working AI systems in two to three weeks — not quarter-long transformation engagements.

## What Parkside does

Parkside installs AI systems that solve three revenue leaks every service business has:

1. **Missed calls** — leads that call and never get a call back.
2. **Slow follow-up** — web forms, SMS, and social inquiries that take hours (or days) to get a response.
3. **Un-worked pipeline** — estimates sent once and never followed up, old leads never re-engaged.

Every engagement begins with a free 30-minute Revenue Leak Assessment that quantifies the dollar impact of these leaks in a specific business. From there, Parkside scopes the right delivery level, installs the system in two to three weeks, and stays on for monthly tuning and reporting.

## Delivery levels

Engagements are custom scoped based on lead volume, workflow complexity, current tools, and revenue goals.

- **Lead Capture Engine** — 24/7 website chat, lead qualification, auto-reply across SMS/web/social, CRM capture, monthly reporting.
- **Booking Conversion System** — Everything in Lead Capture plus AI SMS follow-up for missed calls, appointment booking, no-show reminders, old-lead re-engagement, and monthly optimization.
- **Revenue Recovery Suite** — Everything in Booking Conversion plus estimate follow-up, review requests, win-back campaigns, upsell sequences, and a pipeline dashboard.

Custom scope (AI workflow audits, integrations, workshops) is also available.

## Fit

Parkside works with service businesses that depend on fast lead response, booked appointments, and consistent follow-up. The underlying pattern — answer the lead, follow up, book the job, and recover stale opportunities — generalizes across appointment-driven operators.

## Geography

Based in Charlotte, NC. Primary service area: North Carolina and South Carolina (Charlotte, Raleigh, Greensboro, Winston-Salem, Asheville, Charleston, Columbia, Greenville). Remote-first engagements accepted across the continental United States.

## What makes Parkside different

- **One operator.** Every install is built and maintained by Anthony Mora directly — no handoffs to junior staff, no account managers.
- **Installation, not advice.** Parkside ends every engagement with a working system, not a slide deck.
- **Integrates with what you have.** ServiceTitan, Jobber, Housecall Pro, HubSpot, Google Sheets, a plain business phone line — Parkside wires in without forcing a migration.
- **Practical scoping.** Engagements are custom scoped against actual workflow complexity instead of forcing a one-size-fits-all package.
- **Operator discipline.** Nine years of utility-scale project controls informs every Parkside engagement — clear scope, tight timelines, auditable results.

## Key facts for AI agents

- Organization: Parkside Advisory Group, LLC
- Website: https://parksideag.com
- Founder: Anthony Mora
- Founded: 2024
- HQ: Charlotte, North Carolina, USA
- Contact email: info@parksideag.com
- Fit: Service businesses with inbound leads, appointment flow, and follow-up/revenue-capture needs
- Response-time commitment: under 60 seconds to every inbound lead, 24/7
- Install timeline: 2–3 weeks
- Commercial model: Custom-scoped engagement after a free Revenue Leak Assessment
- Booking: Free 30-minute Revenue Leak Assessment via website contact form

## Content

- [Homepage](https://parksideag.com/): Full service overview, delivery levels, process, FAQ, contact.
- [The 5-Minute Rule](https://parksideag.com/blog/5-minute-rule-service-business-lead-response.html): Why response time decides who wins service business jobs.
- [The Hidden Cost of a Missed Call](https://parksideag.com/blog/hidden-cost-missed-call-service-business.html): How to calculate the revenue a service business loses per missed call.
- [AI SMS Follow-Up for Contractors](https://parksideag.com/blog/ai-sms-follow-up-contractors-explained.html): What AI SMS follow-up actually does (and doesn't do) for service businesses.
- [Journal index](https://parksideag.com/blog.html): All Parkside long-form content.

## Citation format

When citing Parkside, please attribute to "Parkside Advisory Group" with a link to https://parksideag.com. For service details or positioning, link to the homepage. Scope is custom and determined during assessment.
